backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend, implementing user profile management, page content storage, pricing entries, and access control with role-based permissions (admin/user), plus blob storage via mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the hero/header section on SwissOnlineCouplesLandingPage, BaselCouplesLandingPage, and ZurichCouplesLandingPage is horizontally centered in desktop view.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of each page, component, and hook in the project.
frontend/ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration file that ensures the .well-known directory is not ignored during asset deployment.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PaarWeg frontend with German language, SEO meta description for online couples coaching, and Plausible Analytics tracking for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP domain verification file listing paarweg.com and www.paarweg.com as the canonical domains for the Internet Computer deployment.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all public URLs for www.paarweg.com including the homepage, location-specific landing pages, main service pages, and the legal page with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes (including Zurich, Basel, and Swiss Online landing pages), wraps the app in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider, and renders the Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeHexCo: Admin UI card component that displays runtime-computed HEX color values for the page background and primary CTA button, with copy-to-clipboard functionality for each color.
frontend/src/components/CalendlyInlineWi: Empty file placeholder for a Calendly inline widget component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout component providing a sticky header with desktop and mobile navigation, scroll-to-top on route changes, and a footer with Basel headquarters info and dynamic year.
frontend/src/components/MobileReadMore.t: Mobile-only collapsible content component that truncates long text with a gradient fade and a toggle button, controlled by a feature flag to enable or disable compacting behavior.
frontend/src/config/featureFlags.ts: Centralized feature flag configuration object; currently contains a single flag to enable or disable mobile 'Read more / Show less' content compacting behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendlyScript.ts: React hook that lazily injects the Calendly external widget script and CSS into the document and returns a boolean indicating when the widget is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useComputedThemeHexCo: React hook that reads runtime computed CSS theme colors by temporarily injecting probe elements, returning HEX values for background and primary button colors and recomputing on dark mode changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching hardcoded CSR metadata and generating a PKCS#10 CSR client-side using the Web Crypto API with RSA-2048 signing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's warm sand/terracotta color theme, plus base body and typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page for Roland Soder, displaying his bio, credentials, and coaching philosophy with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and a hero section with photo.
frontend/src/pages/BaselCouplesLandingPa: Landing page targeting couples in Basel for pair counseling, featuring a video hero, SEO/OG meta tags, and a scoped Google Ads tag that loads and cleans up on mount/unmount.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact and appointment booking page with SEO/OG meta tags, direct contact info (email/phone), and a Calendly booking link for a free introductory session.
frontend/src/pages/CouplesPage.tsx: Couples coaching service page with SEO/OG meta tags, a hero section describing pair coaching offerings, and a Calendly booking button.
frontend/src/pages/CSRGeneratorPage.tsx: Admin/utility page that auto-generates an SSL Certificate Signing Request on load using a React Query mutation, then displays the CSR and public key with copy and download options.
frontend/src/pages/DomainVerificationPag: A diagnostic page that fetches `/.well-known/ic-domains` and displays whether the Internet Computer domain verification file is correctly configured for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for PaarWeg that sets SEO metadata (title, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data) and renders the hero section and feature cards for the coaching service.
frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.tsx: Displays the Impressum (legal notice) and Datenschutz (privacy policy) information for Roland Soder Coaching, including contact details, liability disclaimers, and copyright notices under Swiss law.
frontend/src/pages/MenPage.tsx: A coaching-for-men landing page that sets relevant SEO metadata and renders a hero section with descriptive copy, feature cards, and CTAs targeting men seeking relationship coaching.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Displays pricing information for PaarWeg coaching sessions (190 CHF / 90 min, free intro call) along with an FAQ accordion, and sets full SEO metadata including Open Graph and Twitter Card tags.
frontend/src/pages/SitemapPage.tsx: Renders a human-readable XML sitemap listing all public PaarWeg URLs with priorities and change frequencies, intended for submission to Google Search Console.
frontend/src/pages/SwissOnlineCouplesLan: Landing page for online couples counseling targeting all of Switzerland, with SEO meta tags, JSON-LD structured data, and a video hero section with play/mute controls.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalStatusPage.t: Admin/diagnostic page that runs and displays status checks for DNS, SSL, WWW CNAME, 301 redirects, Plausible analytics, and domain resolution, along with a theme hex codes section.
frontend/src/pages/WomenPage.tsx: Landing page targeting women in relationships, featuring SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, a hero section with descriptive copy, and a call-to-action button linking to a booking URL.
frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingP: SEO-optimized landing page for couples counseling in Zürich, injecting Google Analytics (gtag) scoped to this page and featuring a video hero section with play/mute controls.
frontend/src/types/calendly.d.ts: TypeScript declaration file that extends the global Window interface with Calendly widget methods for inline, popup, and show/close operations.
frontend/src/utils/color.ts: Utility module providing functions to convert CSS color strings (rgb, rgba, oklch) to uppercase HEX format, including an OKLCH-to-RGB conversion pipeline.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording an existing feature and a pending action request to horizontally center the hero/top section on the Schweiz, Basel, and Zürich landing pages in desktop view.
